understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a tile-based grid to reach the goal gem marked `+`. You have limited attempts (2) and turns (50 each) per level. Hazards like spikes (`u`/`v`) end the run if landed on. Breakable blocks (`x`) can be removed via clicks to open paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal-only (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity automatically pulls you until you land on a solid tile, hazard, or goal. Clicks remove breakable blocks at target positions. UNDO reverts the previous action. Landing positions are previewed by left_landing/right_landing in state. Gravity direction determines whether you fall up or down (higher y or lower y) after horizontal moves. The episode ending after repeated bouncing moves suggests failure to reach the goal within the turn budget or getting stuck.
